name: Paula White
role: Senior Pastor, City of Destiny Church, Apopka, Florida; Former Special Adviser to President Trump
incident: Paula White, Trump's personal pastor and special adviser to the White House Faith and Opportunity Initiative, delivered a prayer on November 5, 2020 calling for angels from Africa and South America to come to the United States and overturn the election results. White had previously preached extensively about respecting democratic institutions and the rule of law as Christian values.

name: Greg Locke
role: Lead Pastor, Global Vision Bible Church, Mount Juliet, Tennessee
incident: Greg Locke, who had preached extensively that divorce is sinful and publicly condemned other pastors for remarrying after divorce, divorced his wife of 21 years and married his church secretary within the same year. Locke had previously called out fellow pastors on social media for moral failures related to marriage and divorce, writing publicly that leaders must be held to a higher standard.

name: Carl Lentz
role: Former Lead Pastor, Hillsong Church New York
incident: Carl Lentz, lead pastor of Hillsong New York who built a celebrity congregation including Justin Bieber and Kevin Durant while preaching extensively about sexual integrity and moral leadership, was fired by Hillsong founder Brian Houston on November 4, 2020 for moral failures. Lentz subsequently admitted to infidelity. A former housekeeper later filed a lawsuit alleging Lentz had sexually coerced her beginning in 2016.
